summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GigInsure AI-powered parametric insurance platform. Backend APIs 92% successful, frontend UI and integrations working excellently. Core features including AI pricing, payment flow, and weather integration all functional.

minor_bugs.issue: Test rider credentials don't exist initially, requires registration first

security_concerns.issue: Brute force protection not triggering 429 status after 5 failed attempts
security_concerns.impact: Security vulnerability - accounts not being locked

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button not easily discoverable in UI

passed_tests: User registration flow with name, email, password, city
Admin login with email/password authentication
Auth /api/auth/me endpoint returns logged-in user data
Dynamic pricing API with AI-calculated premiums (Groq integration)
Policy creation via /api/policies endpoint
Active policy check via /api/policies/active
Mock payment flow via /api/payment/confirm (UPI simulation)
Weather API /api/weather/{city} returns real OpenWeatherMap data
Wallet API /api/wallet returns coin data
Cities API /api/cities returns supported cities list
Frontend login page renders correctly with proper form elements
Frontend registration with city selector (UI elements present)
Frontend dashboard shows policy status, weather, wallet information
Frontend subscription page shows AI pricing and subscribe button
Frontend payment dialog simulation works with UPI/wallet options
Navigation between dashboard and subscribe pages
Real-time AI pricing updates when city selection changes
JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies
CORS configuration allowing credentials
Professional UI design with proper branding and responsive layout
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix brute force protection to properly return 429 status after 5 failed login attempts. Consider adding a more visible logout button in the UI header. Overall application is working excellently with all core features functional.
